basics.name: SUMUKHA S NAZRE
basics.title: Associate Software Engineer
basics.summary: Associate software engineer with hands-on experience in Python, SQL, PySpark, Snowflake, and Databricks. Experienced in building scalable Lakehouse architectures, implementing SCD Type 2 transformations, and migrating enterprise data to Delta Lake. Seeking to contribute to high-performance data engineering solutions in a growth-driven organization.

bullets: Designed and implemented end-to-end Databricks Lakehouse pipelines using Lakebridge and Lakeflow Connect, following Medallion Architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold) for scalable and structured data processing.
Implemented SCD Type 2 transformations aligned with Structured Data Processing (SDP) standards to maintain historical accuracy and auditability.
Migrated enterprise datasets from Oracle to Databricks Delta Lake, performing reconciliation, validation, and performance tuning.
Developed and optimized Delta tables using PySpark and SQL to deliver analytics-ready datasets.
Improved data pipeline performance and reliability through optimization and structured validation frameworks.
Built and maintained scalable ELT pipelines using Snowflake and DBT, transforming raw data into curated, analytics-ready datasets.
Developed complex SQL transformations using joins, window functions, and aggregations on large-scale datasets to support business analytics.
Optimized Snowflake performance using clustering, partition pruning, and efficient warehouse utilization, significantly reducing query runtime and cost.

top_achievements.title: Lakehouse Architect
top_achievements.description: Implemented Medallion Architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold) for NXP Semiconductors.

top_achievements.title: Cloud Transformation
top_achievements.description: Migrated complex enterprise datasets from Oracle to Databricks Delta Lake.

top_achievements.title: Performance Guru
top_achievements.description: Significantly reduced Snowflake query runtime and cost through efficient partitioning.

projects.title: Smart Legacy Scripts Converter
bullets: Developed a Python-based automation tool to convert legacy Perl (.pl) and Shell (.sh) scripts into Python (.py).
Built Flask-based web application and CLI interface for batch conversion.
Designed modular architecture with parsers, translators, and validators to preserve business logic and directory structure.

projects.title: Image Colorization Tool
bullets: Developed an image processing tool to convert grayscale images to color using Python and HTML interface.

projects.title: Strata AI-Powered Migration Platform
bullets: Developed an automated migration tool to convert Oracle database objects (tables, views, sequences, procedures) into Databricks-compatible SQL with dependency resolution.
Implemented intelligent parsing, schema transformation, and constraint handling (FK, CHECK, sequences → identity) to ensure accurate migration.

education.institution: PES Institute of Technology and Management
